# Analysis — Geo-Strategy #5: Why Trump Will Win (And Pick Nikki Haley as VP)

## Thesis / aim

Explain **2020** **Biden** **win** via **coalition** + **suburban** **shift**; argue **2024** **Trump** **favored** by **coalition** **fraying** + **enthusiasm** **gap**; **main** **forecast** — **Trump** **wins** and **picks** **Nikki Haley** **VP** to **replay** **Harris** **redemption** **narrative** and **unlock** **suburbs**. **Hedges:** **Vance** **alternative**; **model** **testing**; **VP** **prediction** **falsifiable**.

## Post-hoc reality check (operator, not Voice)

- **Nov 2024:** **Trump** **elected** — aligns with **Trump** **win** **predictions** (**jiang-GS03-001**, **jiang-GS05-001**).  
- **VP:** **JD Vance** **nominated** **July** **2024** **(RNC)** — **not** **Haley** → **jiang-GS05-002** **contradicted** (lecture **explicitly** **allowed** **Vance** **alternative**). **Trump** **general-election** **win** is **already** **logged** **as** **jiang-GS03-001**.

## Claims (numbered)

1. **Electoral college** **margin** **~65k** **votes** **swing** **—** **verify** **state** **certified** **counts**.  
2. **2024** **Black** **support** **softens**; **inflation** **immigration** **Ukraine** **frame**.  
3. **Gaza** → **young** **protest** **non-vote**.  
4. **Suburbs** **decisive**; **Haley** **as** **Kamala** **parallel** **for** **suburban** **women**.  
5. **Primary** **theater** **(WWE)** **→** **August** **reconciliation** **narrative**.  
6. **Haley** **Iran** **hawks** **(UANI,** **CUFI,** **Boeing)** **—** **VP** **pushes** **war** **if** **selected**.  
7. **Biden** **basement** **strategy** **one** **shot** **—** **may** **not** **repeat**.  
8. **Passion** **gap** **R** **vs** **D** **base**.  
9. **Meta:** **Predictions** **test** **model**.
